message:
refactor(service): improve test ergonomics with pin! macro and typed errors

Test improvements:
- Use std::pin::pin! macro instead of manual Pin::new(&mut fut)
- Add TestError type to replace () for clearer test assertions
- Import std::future::Future for explicit trait usage
- Use fut.as_mut().poll() pattern for cleaner pinned polling

These changes make the timeout fallback test more idiomatic and
self-documenting without changing test behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
